case_title: SON TRUONG PHAN VS. PHIET THE LE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
